title: AI Video Detector Launched to Combat Fake Videos
description: NVIDIA has launched an AI video detector with 92% accuracy, a tool that could be crucial in identifying fake videos.

sources.title: New tool identifies the sources of fake videos
Nvidia’s AI Video Detector Sounds Like the Tool the World Desperately Needs
NVIDIA launches AI video detector with 92% accuracy

sections.heading: NVIDIA's AI Video Detector
paragraphs: NVIDIA has launched an AI video detector with 92% accuracy, according to Digital Watch Observatory. This new tool is designed to help identify fake videos, a significant issue in today's digital landscape.

sections.heading: Fake Video Identification
paragraphs: The University of California, Riverside reported on a new tool that identifies the sources of fake videos. This development is crucial in the fight against deepfakes and misinformation spread through video manipulation.

sections.heading: Reception and Importance
paragraphs: PetaPixel commented on NVIDIA's AI Video Detector, suggesting it is a tool the world desperately needs. The high accuracy rate indicates its potential effectiveness in curbing the spread of manipulated video content.

faq.q: What is NVIDIA's AI video detector?
faq.a: NVIDIA's AI video detector is a tool launched to identify fake videos with a reported 92% accuracy.
This tool is important because it helps combat the spread of deepfakes and misinformation through video manipulation, as highlighted by the University of California, Riverside and PetaPixel.
